---
title: How LLMs work
---



[ynarwal: how-llms-work](https://ynarwal.github.io/how-llms-work/)

[youtube, 9min, How LLMs Actually Generate Text](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NKnZYvZA7w4)


---

[youtube, 60min, Andrej Karpathy: Intro to Large Language Models](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zjkBMFhNj_g)

Without getting too technical, Andrej explains in such a way that you can understand why LLMs are good in some actions and less in others. 

keywords: LLM, inference, training, pre-training, fine-tuning, RHLF, base model, assistent model, Label, Scaling, Tool use, Multimodality, System 1/2 thinking, Prompt Injection, Data Poisoning, AlphaGo, Self improvement, jailbreak.
